headline: A Look At Fortive (FTV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Fortive Is On Investors’ Radar Fortive (FTV) has not released a headline event, but recent share performance is drawing attention, with a 5.3% move over the past month and a 9.9% gain in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Fortive. That recent share price momentum sits alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 16.5% and a 3 year total shareholder return of 22.6%, suggesting investors have been gradually rewarding Fortive over time.
